specification_updates.highlight: Agreed to merge PR #791 (JSON-RPC invalid params error code clarification) and rename it appropriately
Agreed to merge PR removing uncle methods from spec; no clients store uncle data anymore, untestable
PR #762 (debug_traceTransaction standardization) ready to merge pending Felix review; implemented and approved across Geth, Besu, Erigon, Nethermind
PR #790 (eth_getConfig) agreed to merge; replacement for prior PR with corrected auto-generated files

open_rpc_versioning.highlight: OpenRPC 1.4 resolves Go binding and versioning issues; upgrade unblocks PR #797 (eth_subscribe specification)
Documentation versioning demo shown: version dropdown, 'Next' for main branch, release notes workflow, and method tagging all functional; PR coming end of week

missing_methods_review.highlight: HackMD overview of methods missing from spec identified; focus should be methods implemented in 3–4 clients
eth_fillTransaction security concern raised by Nethermind: returning unsigned binary payload is risky; proposal to remove encoded output from method scope
debug_executionWitness not in spec despite all-client implementation; straightforward candidate for a new PR

hive_test_failures.highlight: Nethermind reported eth_simulateV1 Hive failures: multiple test cases failing on same generic error code; need distinct error codes per scenario or reduce test cases
Root cause: clients validate EVM operations in different orders, causing different error codes; proposal to allow multiple acceptable error codes per test fixture

action_items.action: Open PR to upgrade execution-apis OpenRPC spec version to 1.4; unblocks PR #797
Open PR to add debug_executionWitness to execution-apis spec
Bring missing-methods HackMD list to ACDE for broader input on what to standardize or drop

decisions.decision: Merge PR removing eth_getUncle* methods from spec; data unavailable on any current client
Defer PR #797 (eth_subscribe) until OpenRPC spec version is upgraded to 1.4
eth_fillTransaction to be updated: remove unsigned encoded payload from response; retain default-filling behavior only
Documentation versioning: retain 'Next' label for main branch in versioned docs site

targets.target: End of week - documentation versioning PR to be opened by zcstarr
Next call - discuss Hive eth_simulateV1 test failures and error code alignment in detail
